title: Repeat event on day of week in calendar widget
excerpt: On calendar view or the calendar widget, it would be nice to have the ability to select a day of the week for a reoccurring event instead of having to select a specific date each time.

posts.author: corjlsoftware (Corjl)
posts.cookedHtml: On calendar view or the calendar widget, it would be nice to have the ability to select a day of the week for a reoccurring event instead of having to select a specific date each time.
